case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. EDWARD SIMPSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, EDWARD AKA EDWARD DUGLAS SIMPSON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMPSON, EDWARD AKA EDWARD DUGLAS SIMPSON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 102 SOUTH PARK STREET #205, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, EDWARD AKA EDWARD DUGLAS SIMPSON
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION SERVED MAR-27-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, EDWARD AKA EDWARD DUGLAS SIMPSON
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, EDWARD AKA EDWARD DUGLAS SIMPSON
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, EDWARD AKA EDWARD DUGLAS SIMPSON
